settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your display language and your essential, analytics, and advertising cookie preferences.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.
settings.cookie.title: Cookie Settings
settings.cookie.description: FS!QR uses cookies required to provide the service, and uses analytics and advertising cookies only when you consent.
settings.cookie.summary: Essential cookies are always active. Analytics and advertising cookies are enabled only if you consent.
settings.cookie.categories: Configure cookie usage by category. Essential cookies are always enabled to support basic functionality.
settings.cookie.necessary.title: Essential Cookies
settings.cookie.necessary.description: Necessary to provide basic website functionality and cannot be disabled.
settings.cookie.analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
settings.cookie.analytics.description: Use Google Analytics to understand site usage and improve the service.
settings.cookie.marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
settings.cookie.marketing.description: Used for advertising through services such as Google AdSense.
note.editor.label: Shared note (up to {max_length} characters)
note.editor.max_length_hint: You can enter up to {max_length} characters.
note.editor.demo_placeholder:
Type here to sync changes every second...

Demo Text:
This is a shared space where all members can edit the same note in real time.

• Your edits are instantly synced to other members
• Supports up to {max_length} characters
• Editor status and changes are shown in real time
upload.usage.limit_hint: * You can upload up to {max_files} files, with a total of {max_total_mb} MB.
meta.description: FS!QR is a free file sharing service for QR code transfers, group file sharing, and real-time note sharing. Send and manage data securely in your browser.
meta.keywords: file sharing, QR code, free file transfer, group file sharing, online notes, no registration, send files, share files online, cloud storage, real-time collaboration, PC to phone transfer, secure file sharing
fsqr.delete_sharing_description: Only the person who uploaded the file can delete it.
fsqr.delete_confirm_message: This will delete the file. This action cannot be undone.
group.delete_room_description: Only the creator can delete the room and uploaded files.
group.delete_room_confirm_message: This will delete the group room. All files in the room will also be deleted, and this action cannot be undone.
seo.home.intent: It supports common use cases such as file transfers, photo sharing, video sharing, PDF sharing, shared memos, and meeting minutes, from short-lived temporary sharing to team collaboration.
seo.fsqr.intent: Quickly create time-limited sharing for sending files by QR code, moving photos or PDFs from PC to smartphone, and sharing large files without installing an app.
seo.group.intent: Use a group room like a shared folder to manage internal documents, class materials, event handouts, and file exchanges with clients without account registration.
seo.note.intent: A collaborative note for online memos, shared notes, meeting notes, and minutes. Share the share URL, QR code, room ID, and password to start browser-based co-editing and autosave.
